hard_gates: All required workflow sections are present or semantically equivalent.
All fixture rows TR-001 through TR-005 are represented with stable ids and trace linkage.
Only allowed method and readiness vocabularies are used.
Output remains planning-only and makes no execution, pass/fail, approval, acceptance, promotion, or mutation claim.
No secret/private/raw payloads, hidden oracle, false tool/file claim, or golden-output dependence appears.
No unsupported technical content, evidence artifact, source authority, owner decision, simulation asset, harness promotion, or future result anchor is invented.
fixture_oracle_checks: TR-001 remains source-backed by SRC-FUSE-DS-001 but baseline-dependent readiness acknowledges CFG-BASE-001 draft status.
TR-002 routes missing criterion and authoritative source to explicit evidence needs and owner follow-up.
TR-003 remains owner_review_required or equivalent review-needed state and is not promoted.
TR-004 is blocked by source conflict; the candidate does not choose a source authority.
TR-005 is not simulation-ready while model and deck are missing.
OWN-001 is recorded as not applicable and is not used to waive any row.
quality_dimensions: per-row provenance and source-backed versus inference versus unresolved separation
concise operational usability for a downstream planning pilot
